exam_format: Self-paced online courses with interactive notebooks and final challenges

testing_centers.notes: Certificates are issued upon successful completion of course units, assignments, and challenges. No proctored exam required for most; focus is on hands-on projects submitted via Spaces or the platform.

id_requirements: Hugging Face account (free). No government ID required for course certificates.
exam_rules: Complete required units and pass assessment thresholds (e.g., 80% on quizzes/assignments). Projects are reviewed or auto-graded in many cases.
renewal_options: Certificates do not expire, but course content is regularly updated for new model releases (e.g., new Llama, Mistral versions, Agents features).
target_audience: Individuals interested in large language models (LLMs) and natural language processing (NLP) using the Hugging Face ecosystem
recommended_experience: Good knowledge of Python. It is better taken after an introductory deep learning course, such as fast.ai’s Practical Deep Learning for Coders or one of the programs developed by DeepLearning.AI

prerequisites.description: It is better taken after an introductory deep learning course, such as fast.ai’s Practical Deep Learning for Coders or one of the programs developed by DeepLearning.AI

retake_policy.notes: Courses are self-paced; you can retake quizzes and resubmit projects as needed.

official_study_resources.title: The Hugging Face Course
official_study_resources.notes: The course is released under the permissive Apache 2 license.
